generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw this in my local news feed: another terror cell busted near the border. They had plans to hit our city's transit hubs. Our security agencies need more tools to stop these threats before they strike. Remember the 2024 attacks? We can't let that happen again. Time to give our defenders the powers they need to keep us safe. #NationalSecurityFirst #ProtectOurCommunities
